title: Corde (disambiguation)
content:
'''Corde''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Cordé]]''', a [[Naboo Royal Handmaidens|handmaiden]] of [[Padmé Amidala]]
*'''[[Corde (bounty hunter)]]''', a [[bounty hunter]] on [[Jedha]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Cordé/Legends|Cordé]]''', a [[Handmaiden/Legends|handmaiden]] of [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]]
*'''[[Morrigan Corde]]''', an [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] agent

{{Disambig}}
